paragraphs.text: 长城在中国，是非常有名的建筑。
paragraphs.translation: The Great Wall is in China and is a very famous building.

paragraphs.text: 长城很长很长，像一条巨大的龙，睡在山顶上。
paragraphs.translation: The Great Wall is very, very long, like a giant dragon sleeping on the mountaintops.

paragraphs.text: 很久以前，人们修建长城是为了保护自己的国家。
paragraphs.translation: A long time ago, people built the Great Wall to protect their country.

paragraphs.text: 今天，全世界的人都去长城旅游。
paragraphs.translation: Today, people from all over the world travel to the Great Wall.

paragraphs.text: 如果你去北京，一定要去看看长城！
paragraphs.translation: If you go to Beijing, you must go see the Great Wall!
